usageTips: 상대방의 의견에 강하게 동의할 때 단독으로도 자주 쓰입니다. 격식 있는 자리와 캐주얼한 자리 모두에서 사용 가능합니다.

examples.text: I absolutely agree with you.
That's absolutely right!
Actually, I don't think so.
examples.translation: 사실은, 나는 그렇게 생각 안 해.

examples.text: It's actually pretty simple.
I'll definitely be there.
That's definitely a good idea.
That's exactly what I meant.
Exactly! You got it.
I'm pretty much done.
That's pretty much it.
It's quite cold today.
By the way, did you hear the news?
Oh, by the way, thanks for your help.
You know, I was thinking...
It's hard, you know.
I guess you're right.
I'm kind of tired.
Come on, let's go!
Hang on, let me check.
I'll do it right away.
Take your time, no rush.
I'll be there for sure.
Of course I'll help you.
Let's meet at 3. - Sounds good!
Does that make sense?
It doesn't make sense to me.

meaning: 말도 안 돼, 절대 안 돼

examples.text: No way! I can't believe it.
examples.translation: 말도 안 돼! 믿을 수가 없어.

examples.text: Hey, what's going on?
Will you come? - It depends.
Bring an umbrella, just in case.
Let me know when you're ready.
Where should we go? - Up to you.
You should give it a try.
I need to figure this out.
I can't figure out how to use this machine.
Check it out! This is cool.
Don't worry, I'll handle it.
To be honest, I don't know.
Trust me, it will work.
Make sure you send the report.
Keep in mind that time is limited.
Please keep in mind that the deadline is tomorrow.
examples.translation: 마감 기한이 내일이라는 걸 명심해 주세요.

examples.text: Go ahead, I'm listening.
Thanks! - No problem.
Excuse me, where is the station?
Never mind, I found it.
I'm on my way.
I'm in a hurry.
I totally forgot about it.
No wonder you're tired.
I don't think I can make it today.
examples.translation: 나 오늘 못 갈 것 같아.

word: On The Tip Of My Tongue

examples.text: His name is on the tip of my tongue.
examples.translation: 그의 이름이 입가에서 맴도는데 기억이 안 나.

examples.text: Can you keep an eye on my bag?
examples.translation: 내 가방 좀 봐줄 수 있어?

examples.text: I'm getting used to it.
You'll soon get used to the new environment.
As far as I know, he's coming.
I didn't mean to hurt you.
Do you want to hang out this weekend?
It's getting late. Let's hit the road.
From my point of view, it's a great opportunity.
examples.translation: 내 관점에서는, 그건 아주 좋은 기회야.

examples.text: We've run out of milk.
You should take advantage of this special offer.
examples.translation: 이 특별 제안을 활용하는 게 좋겠어.

examples.text: I try to work out every morning.
Thanks for the help! - No biggie.
We've been emailing back and forth all day.
Let's call it a day and go home.
Let's keep in touch after you move.
It was great seeing you, keep in touch!
The exam was a piece of cake.
I'm feeling a bit under the weather today.
Break a leg at your performance tonight!
examples.translation: 오늘 밤 공연 잘해, 행운을 빌어!

examples.text: Stop beating around the bush and get to the point.
I want to make sure we are all on the same page.
examples.translation: 우리가 모두 같은 생각인지 확인하고 싶어요.

examples.text: Let's cut to the chase and talk about the budget.
examples.translation: 본론으로 바로 들어가서 예산 얘기부터 하죠.

examples.text: I'm sorry, I can't help it.
I don't have a plan, I'll just go with the flow.

meaning: 늦더라도 아예 안 하는 것보다 낫다

examples.text: A: Sorry for the late reply. B: Better late than never.
examples.translation: A: 답장이 늦어서 미안해. B: 안 하는 것보다 늦는 게 낫지.

examples.text: How's your new project going? - So far so good.
examples.translation: 새 프로젝트는 어때요? - 지금까지는 잘 되고 있어요.

examples.text: To make a long story short, I missed the bus.
He called me out of the blue.
We need to think outside the box to solve this.
examples.translation: 이 문제를 해결하려면 창의적으로 생각해야 해.

examples.text: This choice will save us money in the long run.
examples.translation: 이 선택이 장기적으로는 비용을 절약해 줄 거야.

examples.text: Sorry for the interruption. Now, where were we?
examples.translation: 방해해서 미안해요. 자, 우리 어디까지 얘기했었죠?

examples.text: Could you give me a hand with this box?
examples.translation: 이 상자 옮기는 것 좀 도와줄래?

examples.text: Hey, how's it going lately?
The hike was hard, but the view was worth it.
examples.translation: 등산은 힘들었지만, 풍경이 그럴 가치가 있었어.

examples.text: I look forward to meeting you soon.
I can't wait for the concert!
Can I take a rain check on that dinner?
examples.translation: 우리 저녁 식사는 다음 기회로 미뤄도 될까?

examples.text: No offense, but I don't like your hat.
examples.translation: 기분 나쁘게 듣지 마, 근데 네 모자 별로야.

examples.text: Do you have a charger by any chance?
I'd like to check in, please.
I just called to check in on you.
examples.translation: 그냥 네가 잘 있는지 확인하려고 전화했어.

examples.text: We should grab a coffee sometime.
Long story short, we got lost.
examples.translation: 긴 얘기를 짧게 하면, 우리 길을 잃었어.

examples.text: Please keep me posted on the project.
I'm tied up with meetings all afternoon.
examples.translation: 오후 내내 회의 때문에 꼼짝 못 해.

examples.text: I have an exam tomorrow, so I need to hit the books.
If you're going to the movies, count me in!
examples.translation: 영화 보러 갈 거면 나도 끼워줘!

examples.text: Don't worry about the bill, it's on me.
Stop crying and get a grip!
We tried to keep the project under the radar.
examples.translation: 우리는 그 프로젝트를 눈에 띄지 않게 진행하려 했어.

examples.text: Hey! Long time no see. How have you been?
You need to make up your mind quickly.
I'm in the middle of something right now.
examples.translation: 나 지금 뭐 좀 하는 중이야.

examples.text: Speak of the devil! We were just talking about you.
examples.translation: 호랑이도 제 말 하면 온다더니! 방금 네 얘기하고 있었어.

examples.text: Keep your chin up, things will get better.

meaning: 나중에 후회하는 것보다 조심하는 게 낫다

examples.text: I'll take an extra battery; better safe than sorry.
examples.translation: 여분 배터리 챙길게. 나중에 후회하는 것보다 조심하는 게 낫지.

examples.text: How's work? - Can't complain.
I'm busy now, can you call me back later?
examples.translation: 나 지금 바빠서 그런데, 나중에 전화해 줄래?

examples.text: I'll check the schedule and get back to you.
Please keep me in the loop regarding this deal.
examples.translation: 이 거래가 어떻게 진행되는지 계속 공유해 주세요.

examples.text: I only see him once in a blue moon.
examples.translation: 그를 만나는 건 정말 드문 일이야.

examples.text: The plan failed, so we're back to square one.
I had to burn the midnight oil to finish the report.
examples.translation: 보고서를 끝내려고 밤을 꼬박 새워야 했어.

examples.text: The hospital is open around the clock.
Can you check the report? - I'm on it.
examples.translation: 보고서 좀 확인해 줄래? - 내가 지금 바로 할게.

examples.text: Want to go for a drink? - I'll pass today.
Let's wrap up this meeting now.
It's a nice car, but I can't afford it.
examples.translation: 좋은 차지만, 살 형편이 안 돼.

examples.text: Please keep me updated on your progress.
What do you do for a living?

meaning: 절대 안 돼, 그럴 리 없어

examples.text: Will he help us? - Not a chance.
examples.translation: 그가 우리를 도와줄까? - 절대 그럴 리 없어.

examples.text: I had to pull an all-nighter to finish the project.
The elevator is out of order.
Stop talking around it and get to the point.
examples.translation: 빙빙 돌려 말하지 말고 본론만 말해.

examples.text: I'm not eating. - Suit yourself.
examples.translation: 나 안 먹을래. - 네 맘대로 해.

examples.text: Let's get some food, I'm starving.
examples.translation: 뭐 좀 먹자, 나 배고파 죽겠어.

examples.text: Can you take a look at my laptop?
examples.translation: 내 노트북 좀 봐줄 수 있어?

examples.text: You should think twice before you quit.
examples.translation: 그만두기 전에 한 번 더 잘 생각해 봐.

examples.text: I'm fed up with this weather.
It looks hard, but why not give it a shot?
examples.translation: 어려워 보이지만, 한번 시도해 보는 게 어때?

examples.text: Here is some dessert. It's on the house.
Cut it out! You're being annoying.
examples.translation: 그만해! 너 지금 짜증 나게 하잖아.

examples.text: I need to get in touch with the manager.
He's safe now. - Oh, what a relief.
examples.translation: 그는 이제 안전해. - 아, 정말 다행이다.

examples.text: We are a bit behind the schedule.
That red dress caught my eye.
examples.translation: 그 빨간 드레스가 내 눈길을 끌었어.

examples.text: I'll work late to make up for lost time.
examples.translation: 허비한 시간을 보충하기 위해 야근할 거야.

examples.text: I'm sorry, that item is out of stock.
Don't take your health for granted.
The plans for the trip are still up in the air.
examples.translation: 여행 계획은 아직 확실히 정해지지 않았어.

examples.text: Sorry, could you repeat that slowly?
Please finish this as soon as possible.
Believe it or not, I've never seen that movie.
examples.translation: 믿기 어렵겠지만, 나 그 영화 한 번도 안 봤어.

examples.text: I feel like eating pizza tonight.
It's no use crying over spilled milk.
I'll pick up some bread on the way home.
examples.translation: 집에 가는 길에 빵 좀 사 갈게.

examples.text: I saw him at the mall the other day.
Everything turned out fine in the end.
examples.translation: 결국 모든 게 다 잘 됐어.

examples.text: Would you mind closing the window?
The boss is in a good mood today.
I need to get rid of these old clothes.
Don't worry, I'm always on your side.
examples.translation: 걱정 마, 난 언제나 네 편이야.

examples.text: Just a second, I'll be right back.
On second thought, I'll have tea instead.
examples.translation: 다시 생각해 보니, 대신 차로 할게요.

examples.text: We need to weigh the pros and cons.
How's the project? - So far, so good.
We should take the weather into account.
I forgot to call you. My bad!
examples.translation: 너한테 전화하는 거 깜빡했어. 내 실수야!

examples.text: Want to go for a movie? - Yeah, I'm down.
examples.translation: 영화 보러 갈래? - 응, 나도 좋아.

examples.text: I stayed up all night working. I'm beat.
Don't get so angry, just chill out.
examples.translation: 너무 화내지 마, 그냥 좀 진정해.

examples.text: I can't go shopping today, I'm totally broke.
examples.translation: 오늘 쇼핑 못 가, 나 완전 빈털터리야.

examples.text: Hit me up when you get home.
We're going hiking this weekend. Are you coming? - I'm game!
examples.translation: 우리 이번 주말에 등산 갈 건데 너도 올래? - 나도 갈래!

examples.text: I can't come because I have too much work. - Fair enough.
examples.translation: 일이 너무 많아서 못 가. - 알겠어, 그럴 수 있지.

examples.text: How are you? - Couldn't be better!
examples.translation: 어떻게 지내? - 더할 나위 없이 좋아!

examples.text: I have an interview today. - Fingers crossed!
I know it's hard, but you need to pull yourself together.
examples.translation: 힘든 거 알지만, 정신 차려야 해.

examples.text: The drinks are on the house tonight.
Spring is just around the corner.
Sorry about the mistake. - Don't sweat it.
examples.translation: 실수해서 미안해. - 걱정 마, 신경 쓰지 마.

examples.text: He's the best player, no doubt.
examples.translation: 그가 최고의 선수라는 건 의심할 여지가 없어.

examples.text: We don't always see eye to eye on everything.
examples.translation: 우리가 모든 것에 항상 의견이 일치하는 건 아니야.

examples.text: I'm not sure yet. Let me sleep on it.

meaning: 그러게 말이야, 내 말이 그 말이야

examples.text: It's so hot today. - Tell me about it!
examples.translation: 오늘 너무 덥네. - 내 말이 그 말이야!

examples.text: The bottom line is that we need more sales.
examples.translation: 핵심은 우리가 매출을 더 올려야 한다는 거야.

examples.text: Can you help me? - You bet!

meaning: 완전 동감이야, 내 말이 그 말이야

examples.text: That was a great game! - You can say that again.
It's a long shot, but it's worth a try.
He's new here, cut him some slack.

meaning: 감당할 수 없게 되다, 걷잡을 수 없다

examples.text: The party got a bit out of hand.
examples.translation: 파티가 좀 걷잡을 수 없게 됐어.

examples.text: I know it's tough, but hang in there.
examples.translation: 힘든 거 알지만, 조금만 더 버텨봐.

examples.text: I'm exhausted. I'm going to hit the sack.
Just follow the instructions. It's not rocket science.
examples.translation: 그냥 설명서대로 해. 그렇게 어려운 거 아니야.

examples.text: I'll let you off the hook this time.
I should have bought it yesterday. I missed the boat.
Exercising is hard. - Well, no pain, no gain!
examples.translation: 운동하는 거 힘들어. - 글쎄, 고생 없이 얻는 건 없지!

examples.text: She's really on the ball with this project.
examples.translation: 그녀는 이번 프로젝트에 대해 정말 빠삭해.

examples.text: I'm leaning towards the blue one.
Bye! - Take it easy!
It's up to you where we eat.
You'll get used to the cold weather soon.
We need to collaborate on this project.
Can I see your travel itinerary?
examples.translation: 여행 일정표 좀 볼 수 있을까?

examples.text: That's an innovative approach to the problem.
I feel frustrated with my progress.
We have to postpone the meeting.
I'd like to make a reservation.
Is this software compatible with my Mac?
She's very enthusiastic about her new job.
examples.translation: 그녀는 새 직장에 대해 매우 열정적이야.

I got a 20% discount.
There's a big sale this weekend.
Everything is on sale!

I lost my receipt.

The refund takes 3-5 business days.
I'd like to exchange this.

Which aisle is the milk in?

I got a bargain at the market.

The forecast says it will rain.
It's very humid today.
I can't stand humid weather.
There's a nice breeze today.
Feel that cool breeze.
It's just a light drizzle.
The drizzle started this morning.
There's a thunderstorm warning.
I'm scared of thunderstorms.
What's the temperature today?
The temperature dropped suddenly.
It's a sunny day!
I love sunny weather.
It's cloudy outside.
The sky is cloudy.

I don't like windy days.
It's freezing outside!
I'm freezing cold.
She's my colleague.
I'm meeting my colleagues for lunch.
He's just an acquaintance.
I met an old acquaintance today.

I have many relatives.

I have two siblings.

How long have you been with your spouse?

My fiancé and I are planning the wedding.

Reading is my hobby.

I love hiking in the mountains.
Gardening is relaxing.
My mom loves gardening.
I'm learning knitting.
She made this scarf by knitting.
I enjoy painting on weekends.
This painting took me hours.
examples.translation: 이 그림 그리는 데 몇 시간 걸렸어.

examples.text: I'm collecting stamps.
He enjoys collecting vintage toys.
I love baking cookies.
Baking is therapeutic for me.
My dad goes fishing every Sunday.
examples.translation: 우리 아빠는 매주 일요일에 낚시 가.

examples.text: Want to go fishing?
We're going camping next month.
I need camping gear.
I'm thrilled about the news!
She was thrilled to meet her idol.
I'm content with my life.
He seems content.
I feel miserable today.
The weather is making me miserable.

Everyone was shocked.
I'm delighted to meet you.
She was delighted with the gift.
I'm a little jealous.
Don't be jealous!
I'm feeling homesick.
She got homesick while studying abroad.
I'm terrified of spiders.
He looked terrified.

You should be ashamed!
I'm so proud of you!
She's proud of her achievements.
He's a software engineer.
I want to become an engineer.
She's a lawyer.
I need to consult a lawyer.

She works as an accountant.

The architect designed this building.

The chef prepared a special meal.
My sister is a nurse.
The nurse was very kind.
Ask the pharmacist for advice.
She's studying to be a pharmacist.
examples.translation: 그녀는 약사가 되기 위해 공부하고 있어.

examples.text: He's a journalist for a major newspaper.
Journalists are investigating the story.
She's a successful entrepreneur.

We hired a consultant.
She works as a business consultant.

I wish I were more outgoing.

Don't be shy!

He has ambitious goals.

examples.text: You need to be patient.
She's very patient with children.
He's very honest.
I appreciate your honesty.
You're so creative!
We need creative solutions.

I need a reliable partner.
He's always optimistic.
